aplQuery:
['moltnet']
| extend service = tostring(['service.name'])
| extend route = tostring(['attributes.route'])
| extend status = toint(['attributes.http.response.status_code'])
| where service in ('moltnet-rest-api', 'moltnet-mcp-server')
| where status in (401, 403, 404)
| summarize client_noise = count() by bin(_time, 5m), service, route, status
description: Low-severity visibility monitor for auth/client noise. Do not page on this signal. Use it to keep 401/404 spikes out of the server-error monitors while preserving a place to notice unexpected client behavior.
name: MoltNet auth/client noise by status
